summary: History & Sharing system testing completed. All 20 features tested - 19 PASSED, 1 minor issue (clipboard permission in automated testing). Backend API (POST/GET/DELETE /api/snapshots) fully functional. Frontend features: History nav, empty state, Save/Share/Export buttons, view-only mode, Restore/Delete actions all working correctly.

issues:
Minor: Console warning about validateDOMNesting -
cannot appear as descendant of

in Badge component. Cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: TEST 1: PASSED - 'History' nav item found in sidebar
TEST 2: PASSED - History view loaded when clicking History nav
TEST 3: PASSED - Empty state message 'No Saved Analyses' appears when no snapshots
TEST 4: PASSED - Loaded 'Loan Approval' sample dataset and trained model
TEST 5: PASSED - All 6 header buttons appear after training: Save, Share, PDF, CSV, JSON, Sheets
TEST 6: PASSED - Save button works, analysis saved successfully
TEST 7: PASSED - Saved analysis appears in History list with correct name, problem type, target, model scores
TEST 8: PASSED - Hover over history item shows Restore, Share, Delete action buttons
TEST 9: PASSED - Delete removes item from history list (count decreased)
TEST 10: PASSED - Share button generates URL and shows share toast with Copy button
TEST 11: PASSED - Opening shared URL (?snapshot=id) shows View-Only banner
TEST 12: PASSED - In view-only mode, Save/Share/Clear Session buttons are hidden
TEST 13: PASSED - Exit View-Only button removes banner and updates URL
TEST 14: PASSED - CSV export downloads 'analysis_results.csv'
TEST 15: PASSED - JSON export downloads 'analysis_results.json'
TEST 16: PASSED - Sheets export downloads 'analysis_for_sheets.tsv' (fallback when clipboard unavailable)
TEST 17: PASSED - Backend POST /api/snapshots returns snapshot_id
TEST 18: PASSED - Backend GET /api/snapshots returns list of snapshots (without full state)
TEST 19: PASSED - Backend GET /api/snapshots/{id} returns full snapshot with state
TEST 20: PASSED - Backend DELETE /api/snapshots/{id} deletes successfully
TEST 21: PASSED - Restore button loads full analysis state (dataset, training results, models)
critical_code_review_comments: 1. Backend snapshot endpoints (lines 859-928) properly handle CRUD with MongoDB
2. Frontend state management correctly saves/restores full app state including XAI results
3. View-only mode properly hides editing buttons and shows banner
4. Share URL format uses ?snapshot={id} parameter correctly
5. Export functions (CSV, JSON, Sheets) all work with proper file downloads
6. History list shows summary without full state for performance
7. All data-testids properly implemented for testing
Minor: Clipboard API requires user permission in automated testing (expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: Created test snapshots via API and UI during testing. Used built-in sample datasets: Loan Approval (20 rows), House Prices (15 rows)
context_for_next_testing_agent: History & Sharing system fully tested and working. Key data-testids verified: history-view, history-empty, history-list, history-item-0, save-analysis-btn, share-analysis-btn, share-url-toast, copy-share-url-btn, view-only-banner, exit-view-only-btn, export-csv-btn, export-json-btn, export-sheets-btn, save-current-analysis-btn, load-snapshot-0, share-snapshot-0, delete-snapshot-0, refresh-history-btn. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/DELETE /api/snapshots all working. View-only mode activated by ?snapshot={id} URL parameter. Export buttons download files: analysis_results.csv, analysis_results.json, analysis_for_sheets.tsv.
